ground.schema:
Node properties:
User {betweenness: FLOAT, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, following: INTEGER, profile_image_url: STRING, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING, url: STRING, statuses: INTEGER}
Me {profile_image_url: STRING, betweenness: FLOAT, following: INTEGER, url: STRING, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING}
Tweet {created_at: DATE_TIME, id: INTEGER, id_str: STRING, text: STRING, favorites: INTEGER, import_method: STRING}
Hashtag {name: STRING}
Link {url: STRING}
Source {name: STRING}
Relationship properties:
SIMILAR_TO {score: FLOAT}
The relationships:
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:Me)
(:User)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:User)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:Me)
(:Me)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:Me)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:RT_MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:AMPLIFIES]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:Me)
(:Tweet)-[:USING]->(:Source)
(:Tweet)-[:TAGS]->(:Hashtag)
(:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link)
(:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(:Tweet)
(:Tweet)-[:REPLY_TO]->(:Tweet)
ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (user1:User {name: 'Alice'})-[r1:FOLLOWS]->(user2:User),
    p2 = (user1)-[r2:POSTS]->(tweet1:Tweet),
    p3 = (tweet1)-[r3:MENTIONS]->(user2)
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does Alice’s engagement with the user she follows—whom she directly mentions in her tweet—compare to her broader follower network’s activity patterns?

cypher:
MATCH (alice:User {name: 'Alice'})-[r:FOLLOWS]->(followed:User)<-[:MENTIONS]-(aliceTweet:Tweet)<-[:POSTS]-(alice:User),       (aliceTweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(retweet:Tweet)<-[:POSTS]-(retweeter:User),       (aliceTweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(retweeter),       (aliceTweet)-[:USING]->(source:Source),       (aliceTweet)-[:TAGS]->(hashtag:Hashtag),       (aliceTweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(link:Link),       (aliceTweet)-[:REPLY_TO]->(replyTweet:Tweet)<-[:POSTS]-(replyer:User)
WITH alice, followed, aliceTweet, retweeter, source, hashtag, link, replyer
MATCH (alice)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(otherUser:User)
WHERE otherUser <> followed AND otherUser <> alice
WITH alice, followed, aliceTweet, retweeter, source, hashtag, link, replyer,       [(alice)-[*10]->(otherUser) | otherUser] AS alice_network,       [(followed)-[*10]->(otherUser) | otherUser] AS followed_network,       [(retweeter)-[*10]->(otherUser) | otherUser] AS retweeter_network
RETURN alice, followed, aliceTweet, retweeter, source, hashtag, link, replyer,       alice_network, followed_network, retweeter_network
